# Stream Downloader

[中文](#中文) | [English](#english)

---

## English

### AI-Generated Project

**This project was created entirely using AI.** The entire codebase, architecture design, and documentation were generated by an AI agent (Claude, Anthropic) based on the product requirements document. No human wrote any of the source code in this repository.

### Overview

Stream Downloader is a browser extension for downloading M3U8 (HLS) and MPD (DASH) video streams directly from websites.

### Features

- **Network Sniffer Engine** - Automatically detects media streams via URL suffix and Content-Type dual detection
- **M3U8 (HLS) Parser** - Parses master/media playlists, downloads and merges TS segments
- **MPD (DASH) Parser** - Parses DASH manifests, downloads segments with FFmpeg.wasm muxing
- **AES-128 Decryption** - Automatic decryption of encrypted HLS streams
- **Multi-threaded Concurrency** - Configurable parallel downloads (default: 6 threads)
- **Download Management** - Pause, resume, cancel, and download queue
- **Live Stream Recording** - Record live HLS/DASH streams in real-time
- **Popup & Side Panel UI** - Clean dark-themed interface

### Technical Stack

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|------------|
| Architecture | Chrome Extension MV3 |
| Language | TypeScript (strict mode) |
| Bundler | Webpack 5 |
| Video Processing | FFmpeg.wasm |
| Protocols | HLS (M3U8/TS), DASH (MPD/M4S) |
| Browser APIs | webRequest, declarativeNetRequest, Downloads, Storage |

### Supported Browsers

- Chrome / Edge 93+
- Firefox (latest)
- Kiwi Browser (Android)

### Installation

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Development mode
npm run dev

# Production build
npm run build
```

### Permissions

This extension requires the following permissions:
- `webRequest` - Observe network requests
- `declarativeNetRequest` - Handle media requests
- `downloads` - Save downloaded files
- `storage` - Store settings
- `notifications` - Download notifications
- `tabs` - Tab management
- `sidePanel` - Side panel UI

### Privacy

All operations are performed locally. No data is collected or transmitted.

## 中文

### AI 全程生成项目

**本项目完全由 AI 生成。** 整个代码库、架构设计和文档均由 AI 代理（Claude, Anthropic）根据产品需求文档自动生成。本仓库中的所有源代码均非人工编写。

### 项目简介

Stream Downloader（流媒体下载器）是一款浏览器扩展插件，用于直接从网页下载 M3U8 (HLS) 和 MPD (DASH) 视频流。

### 核心功能

- **网络嗅探引擎** - URL 后缀 + Content-Type 双重检测，自动识别媒体流
- **M3U8 解析器** - 解析 Master/Media 播放列表，下载并合并 TS 分片
- **MPD 解析器** - 解析 DASH 清单，支持 FFmpeg.wasm 混流
- **AES-128 解密** - 自动解密加密的 HLS 流
- **多线程并发** - 可配置并行下载（默认 6 线程）
- **下载管理** - 暂停、恢复、取消、下载队列
- **直播录制** - 实时录制 HLS/DASH 直播流
- **Popup 与侧边栏** - 简洁暗色主题界面

### 技术栈

| 组件 | 技术 |
|------|------|
| 架构 | Chrome Extension MV3 |
| 语言 | TypeScript（严格模式）|
| 打包 | Webpack 5 |
| 视频处理 | FFmpeg.wasm |
| 协议 | HLS (M3U8/TS), DASH (MPD/M4S) |
| 浏览器 API | webRequest, declarativeNetRequest, Downloads, Storage |

### 支持浏览器

- Chrome / Edge 93+
- Firefox（最新版）
- Kiwi Browser（安卓）

### 安装使用

```bash
# 安装依赖
npm install

# 开发模式
npm run dev

# 生产构建
npm run build
```

### 权限说明

本扩展需要以下权限：
- `webRequest` - 观察网络请求
- `declarativeNetRequest` - 处理媒体请求
- `downloads` - 保存下载文件
- `storage` - 存储设置
- `notifications` - 下载通知
- `tabs` - 标签页管理
- `sidePanel` - 侧边栏界面

### 隐私声明

所有操作均在本地完成，不收集、不传输任何数据。
